name: wezterm-cli
description: Controls a running WezTerm instance using `wezterm cli` to list windows/tabs/panes, spawn tabs/windows, split panes, focus/activate panes or tabs, set tab/window titles, rename workspaces, resize/zoom panes, capture pane text, and send text to panes. Use when user asks to automate a WezTerm layout, manage tabs/panes/workspaces, or run commands in a specific WezTerm pane.
compatibility: For Claude Code or any shell-capable agent running on a machine with WezTerm installed and at least one running wezterm GUI or multiplexer instance. Requires permission to run the `wezterm` executable.
